title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0302
summary: 1 The Circuit Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit, acting under Judicial Code § 239, 28 U.S.C. § 346, has certified the following question for our determination: '(1) Is the United States a necessary party to a proceeding to determine the heirship of a deceased citizen allottee of the Five Civ...
